criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across all platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI features within the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.

criteria.name: Feature Richness
criteria.description: Variety and depth of features offered by the app.

criteria.name: Update Frequency
criteria.description: How often the app is updated with new features and bug fixes.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: How well the app protects user data and privacy.

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app on different platforms (iOS, Android, Web, etc.).
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, official app websites

criteria.name: Community and Support
criteria.description: Quality of customer support and community engagement.
criteria.sources: User reviews, official app forums, social media

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: Uniqueness and innovation in the app's approach to lifestyle management.
criteria.sources: Tech blogs, app awards, user reviews
